ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Hieronymi Butigellæ papiensis equitis et U. I. D. clarissimi in primam partem C. [i.e. of the Justinian Codex] commentaria ac repetitiones
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: ex libro ipsius auctoris manuscripto, maxima fide, et diligentia excepta, additis summariis ac copioissimo [sic] repertorio, nunc primum in lucem edita.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
